{{Quote|We'll get a great tour of this beautiful metropolis today!|[[Dax Gazaway]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Racer Revenge">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''</ref>}}
'''Orotoru G'am''' was a large city on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] off the coast of the [[Grand Reefs]]. It was kept afloat by a system of [[ballast tank]]s.

It was best known as the home of the [[Hall of Heroes (Dac)|Hall of Heroes]].

==History==
By [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], the city hosted the third race of the [[Galactic Trials]] on [[Orotoru G'am (track)|Orotoru G'am's racetrack]] and the fourt race of the [[Podracing Open]] on [[Ballast Complex|The Ballast Complex]].

==Appearances==
